german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not Dominant
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant portion of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility issues.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate, Leaving Customer-Facing Roles Limited
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core PMs and Customer-facing PMs, indicating a concentration in product management roles.

seniority.title: Mid-level Roles Are Most Prevalent
seniority.subtitle: Mid-level positions account for 38% of the workforce, with no junior roles present.

work_mode.title: Flexibility in Work Modes Remains Uncertain
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of roles lacks clear classification, with mixed remote and hybrid options available.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, limiting remote access.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Now Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: 31% of roles require AI as a core responsibility or skill.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Equal Representation Across Sectors
industry.subtitle: No single sector dominates, but unclassified roles limit overall accessibility.
